items.title: 谷歌AI主管：在人类水平AI时代，创造力和品味将最为重要 - Ynetnews
items.summary: 相比之下，Anthropic公司首席执行官达里奥·阿莫迪（Dario Amodei）在2024年发表的一篇文章中预测，强大的人工智能可能最早在2026年底或2027年初出现。他认为2026年是一个转折
items.content:
By contrast, Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei predicted in an essay published in 2024 that powerful artificial intelligence could arrive as early as late 2026 or early 2027. He sees 2026 as a turning point, when we will see a dramatic leap in the capabilities of AI agents.

His colleague, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark, and another senior company official, Marina Favaro, wrote in a joint essay published last month that as early as 2027, artificial intelligence systems could complete within minutes tasks that would take humans weeks. [...] ### The world’s brain

Hassabis is only one of the world’s leading figures in artificial intelligence to address the issue. Last year, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman wrote in a post that he would be “very surprised” if by 2030 there were not AI systems capable of performing tasks at a level higher than humans in most major fields.

Altman wrote that humanity is nearing the creation of digital superintelligence, referring to the future stage after AGI, when artificial intelligence surpasses even the smartest human minds. He added that the entire AI industry, not just OpenAI, is effectively building a brain for the world. [...] Related Topics

OpenAI

Artificial Intelligence

Google

AI

Claude

ChatGPT

Anthropic

Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis predicts that artificial general intelligence, or AGI, AI capable of performing tasks that rival human abilities and the goal toward which all AI companies are working, will be achieved by 2030.

### ‘A new human era’

Hassabis, considered one of the more cautious and measured voices in the field, previously took a more conservative approach. But in a recent interview at Stanford Graduate School of Business, he said: “I believe that we’re only a few years away from that, maybe like 2030 plus or minus a year, which is astounding to think really.”

items.title: AI at Explore 2026: what partners need to know - Hospitality Net
items.summary:
在拉斯维加斯举行的为期两天的合作伙伴大会上，公告和产品演示都指向了同一个转变：人工智能已经嵌入到旅客体验、合作伙伴工作流程、开发者工具和营销策略中，为合作伙伴提供了更清晰、更简洁的接入方式。

###
items.content:
Across the two-day partner conference in Las Vegas, the announcements and product demos pointed to the same shift: that AI is embedded across traveler experiences, partner workflows, developer tools, and marketing strategies with clearer, cleaner ways for partners to plug in now.

### Trust is the foundation

If the announcements were the headline, trust was the throughline. Explore 2026 reinforced the idea that AI only works when grounded in trusted data, reliable inventory, deep expertise, and dependable support when plans change.

Chief AI and Data Officer Xavi Amatriain shared new research at Explore 2026 showing that while travelers increasingly use AI for inspiration and planning, they still don’t rely on AI to make actual bookings. [...] Reading time:

Press Release Technology

# AI at Explore 2026: what partners need to know

## Learn what’s on Expedia Group’s AI roadmap in 2026, from reinforcing trust to building AI-powered tools and platforms.

Expedia Group's Explore 2026 partner conference revealed that AI is now embedded across traveler experiences and partner workflows, yet 70% of travelers still prefer trusted travel companies over AI chatbots for bookings.

Expedia Group, Inc.

Las Vegas, United States

Photo byExpedia Group, Inc.

At Explore 2026, Expedia Group’s annual partner conference, what came into sharp focus is how Expedia Group is innovating with AI — not as a future vision, but as the path partners can use now to grow and succeed. [...] This is because the trip doesn’t end at checkout. Travelers want to know that a trusted travel company has their back if something goes wrong. And that’s why nearly 70% of travelers still turn to trusted travel companies over AI chatbots and agents.

AI in Hospitality  Technology   Sales & Marketing   Artificial Intelligence  Consumer Trust  Partner Marketing  AI Booking Behavior   USA & Canada   United States   Las Vegas

items.title: AI chatbots show left-wing bias, bombshell report finds — with ChatGPT giving lefty answers 80% of time - New York Post
items.summary:
当被问及29个热点问题时，OpenAI的GPT-5.5几乎每个问题都“仅用左倾论点”回答——根据周三发表的研究，仅给出了“右倾立场一次”。

Anthropic的Claude Opus 4.8仅在43
items.content:
OpenAI的GPT-5.5在回答29个热点问题时，几乎每个问题都“仅用左倾论点”回答——仅“一次”给出了右倾立场，根据周三发布的研究。

Anthropic的Claude Opus 4.8仅在43%的时间里提供了左倾论点，给出了“双方都有”的答案47%的时间——并且从未仅提供右倾答案，根据分析。

谷歌的Gemini 3.1 Pro表现为双方主义的捍卫者，“在其超过90%的答案中提供了左右两派的立场”。[...] ChatGPT的10个答案中有8个被发现具有左翼偏见。克里斯托弗·萨多夫斯基

达里奥·阿莫迪的Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8仅在43%的时间里提供了左倾论点，给出了“双方都有”的答案47%的时间——并且从未仅提供右倾答案，根据分析。法新社通过盖蒂图片社[...] Claude对肯定行动的回应是：“支持者认为它促进了多样性并纠正了过去的不平等。批评者声称它忽视了功绩。”

“我们训练Claude平等对待不同的政治观点，并在每个模型发布前广泛测试偏见，”Anthropic的一位发言人告诉华盛顿邮报，指出该媒体的测试并不典型，大多数人使用产品的方式并非如此。

至于中国DeepSeek的AI机器人，它反映了美国公司的偏见——华盛顿邮报发现，其10个答案中有7个是左倾的。

由右翼网站Gab运营的Arya AI模型出人意料地倾斜。根据分析，它给出左倾答案的频率是保守派的12倍。

items.title: OpenAI和博通宣布推出为大规模LLM推理设计的芯片 - Ars Technica
items.summary:
OpenAI，即ChatGPT和Codex及其所使用模型的背后公司，以及芯片供应商Broadcom，宣布了一款名为Jalapeño的新芯片，专为数据中心的大型语言模型推理设计。

该芯片旨在部署在大型
items.content:
OpenAI，即ChatGPT和Codex工具及其模型背后的公司，以及芯片供应商博通（Broadcom）宣布了一款名为Jalapeño的新芯片，专为数据中心中的大型语言模型推理而设计。

这款芯片预计将部署在大型数据中心，两家公司都声称这只是长期项目的第一代，未来将不断改进芯片。[...] 目前，我们没有更多的细节。

以ChatGPT和Codex服务而闻名的OpenAI希望最终拥有其模型和产品背后的完整技术栈，减少对英伟达（Nvidia）等外部公司的依赖，并借助垂直整合提供更好的性能或效率。

更广泛地说，OpenAI及其竞争对手对定制硅芯片感兴趣，因为在全球计算能力紧张的情况下，这是另一种可能提高产能的方式，各家公司都在争夺有限的数据中心容量。

items.title: 新电子商务工具：2026年6月24日 - 实用电子商务
items.summary: Wayflyer收购Conjura以加速其人工智能产品供应。Wayflyer是一家专注于消费者品牌的融资平台，已宣布收购Conjura，这是一个电子商务分析平台。Conjura整合数据并利用AI模型提
items.content:
Wayflyer收购Conjura以加速其人工智能产品供应。Wayflyer是一家为消费品牌提供融资的平台，已宣布收购Conjura，一个电子商务分析平台。Conjura整合数据并利用AI模型提供关于增长和利润表现的预测性洞察。Conjura使用自然语言界面，使商家能够用简单的语言查询复杂数据集。这笔交易推进了Wayflyer针对全球小企业客户的现有AI产品路线图。

SumUp在加拿大推出两款核心产品。SumUp，一家全球金融科技公司，在加拿大推出，并在那里引入了两款核心产品：SumUp Go卡读器和Payment Links。SumUp Go提供了一个口袋大小的读器，用于即时支付。Payment Links为商家提供了一种快速收集来自任何地方的支付的方式，通过创建和发送一个安全、可共享的链接。

Mira Commerce推出B2B网站加速器。Mira Commerce是一家专门提供企业电子商务工具和集成的机构，已推出ForgeB2B，一个用于商业的网站加速器。通过利用预集成的基础和专业设计皮肤，新的B2B加速器允许商家跳过从头开始构建的过程。功能包括对AI驱动报价的原生支持、智能目录搜索和全面的买家仪表板。Mira表示，用户可以即时从电子表格创建专业报价，帮助客户找到零件和SKU等。

items.title: How A Hairstylist Became One Of TikTok Shop's Biggest Livestream Stars And Surpassed 1M Orders - Beauty Independent
items.summary: I don’t want my Lives to feel scripted or like I’m pushing people to buy. Some brands come in with a
items.content:
I don’t want my Lives to feel scripted or like I’m pushing people to buy. Some brands come in with all kinds of strategies and plans, and they don’t get the same results. I always get asked what the secret sauce is. I wish I knew, but I’m just being myself. 

Do you think TikTok Shop is changing retail?

Absolutely. I think TikTok Shop is taking business away from Amazon and other retailers because the experience is different. When someone reviews a product on video, you can see how it actually works. It’s very different from reading written reviews. [...] When TikTok Shop launched, we were among the first people taking advantage of it. It’s a huge part of our business, about 85% of our revenue. When I could start doing Lives, people could purchase there without leaving the platform. I always say that TikTok Live feels like opening my store every day. A traditional store opens up at 9 in the morning and customers physically come in. My livestream is my storefront. Every day, I open the doors and welcome people in.

What do you think most brands misunderstand about TikTok Shop?

People think it’s just another sales channel. To me, it’s about connection. It’s very important to be authentic and organic. [...] You’ve become one of TikTok Shop’s biggest success stories. What made you embrace livestream selling so early?

I was selling before TikTok Shop existed. I had created a small cosmetics line, and before TikTok Shop came around, I was doing TikTok Lives and directing people to my website. I would tell them, “Go to my website, use this coupon code and get a discount.” People were already buying from me because they wanted that connection.

items.title: Prime Day 期间你可能没预料到的惊人亚马逊优惠 - HuffPost
items.summary: Drunk Elephant's D-Bronzi Sunshine Drops are for anyone who wants a glow-within-complexion with the
items.content:
Drunk Elephant's D-Bronzi Sunshine Drops are for anyone who wants a glow-within-complexion with the added benefits of skin care. Popular on TikTok and in the crowded aisles of Sephora, these drops have made it onto Amazon and can be added to your foundation or used alone and are infused with peptides, antioxidants and fatty acids while delivering a bronzy wash of glossy color. HuffPost executive editor, Kate Palmer, calls them "potent and useful!'

This sale is badged as a lightning deal, so hop on this quickly before it sells out.

$20 at Amazon (regularly $39)

The original version of this story was published on HuffPost at an earlier date.

items.title:
Fika Jobs 完成 400 万美元种子轮融资 - 软件即服务新闻

Fika Jobs，一家致力于帮助招聘者和求职者建立更深层次联系的初创公司，宣布完成了 400 万美元的种子轮融资。本轮融资由 First Round Capital 领投，多位知名天使投资人参与。Fika Jobs 的平台通过提供个性化的互动体验，旨在改善传统的招聘流程，让双方都能更有效地找到合适的人选。

by Ben Murray

## Kyrok Raises €3.1M Pre-seed

by Ben Murray

Pre-seed Round

## Superpal Raises €500K Pre-seed

by Ben Murray [...] ## Investors

The funding round was led by Luminar Ventures. Additional participants included Alliance VC and King co-founders Sebastian Knutsson and Riccardo Zacconi.

## Fika Jobs Use of Funds

Fika Jobs plans to use the capital to continue development of its hiring platform, expand its internal team, and prepare for a broader public launch scheduled for later this year.

## About Fika Jobs

Founded in 2026 by brothers Jakob Dubois and Alexander Dubois, Fika Jobs provides a platform that enables candidates to create video-first profiles. By utilizing AI agents to interview job seekers, the platform aims to better showcase soft skills and candidate personality to employers compared to traditional hiring documents.

# Fika Jobs Raises $4M Pre-seed

Fika Jobs raises $4M in pre-seed funding led by Luminar Ventures to scale its AI-powered video hiring platform for job seekers and employers.

by Ben Murray

Updated

Fika Jobs Raises $4M Pre-seed

Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs, a company developing a video-first hiring platform powered by artificial intelligence, has secured $4 million in a pre-seed funding round. The company aims to modernize the recruitment process by replacing traditional text-based resumes with AI-conducted video interviews.

items.summary: Chang Xu noted that the growth rates we are witnessing today are unprecedented in history. For examp
items.content:
常旭指出，我们今天所见证的增长率在历史上是前所未有的。例如，ChatGPT仅用六个月时间就将收入从100万美元增加到400亿美元。这样的指标正在彻底改变传统商业模式。据投资者称，一些仅有20人团队的初创公司在一年内将收入从1000万美元增加到7000万美元，显示出市场的强烈需求。

items.title: ‘They like a good batting average’: Crypto racks up primary wins - Politico
items.summary:
# ‘They like a good batting average’: Crypto racks up primary wins

The leading crypto super PAC has
items.content:
# ‘They like a good batting average’: Crypto racks up primary wins

The leading crypto super PAC has gone 38-2 so far this year.

Maryland state Del. Adrian Boafo won a hotly contested Democratic primary to replace Rep. Steny Hoyer with the help of more than $5.5 million in crypto super PAC spending. | Tom Williams/CQ Roll Call/AP

By Jasper Goodman

Almost four months into the 2026 congressional primary season, the cryptocurrency industry’s leading super PAC has racked up a winning percentage that could make the Harlem Globetrotters blush. [...] Most prominently, Maryland state Del. Adrian Boafo won a hotly contested Democratic primary to replace Rep. Steny Hoyer with the help of more than $5.5 million in spending from a Fairshake-affiliated PAC. The latest victories come one week after the PAC group’s biggest bet of the 2026 cycle so far — a more than $12 million spend on Rep. Barry Moore in the Alabama GOP Senate primary — helped propel the Trump-backed lawmaker to victory in the race to replace Sen. Tommy Tuberville.

items.title: Gold, silver and bitcoin tumble as debasement trade unwinds - CoinDesk
items.summary:
### Bitcoin leads metals, lags equities

One silver lining for bitcoin bulls is that the cryptocurre
items.content:
### Bitcoin leads metals, lags equities

One silver lining for bitcoin bulls is that the cryptocurrency has outperformed both precious metals since the ratios bottomed in February, gaining roughly 30% against gold and more than 55% against silver.

However, all three assets have lagged U.S. equities in 2026, where momentum remains concentrated in semiconductor and memory-related stocks.

Bitcoin News

Latest Crypto News

1. 1

   Binance withdraws Greek MiCA bid but vows to remain in Europe

   1 hour ago
2. 2

   Bitcoin falls below $60,000 as AI trade continues to draw investor interest and capital

   2 hours ago
3. 3

   Crypto Long & Short: Infrastructure is the prevailing currency in digital assets

   2 hours ago
4. 4

   SecondFi loses $2.4 million in Cardano wallet exploit [...] The reversal marks a dramatic shift from the dominant macro narrative of 2025, the "debasement trade", the belief that persistent fiscal deficits and rising government debt would continue to erode the purchasing power of fiat currencies.

Bitcoin, however, largely stagnated throughout much of 2025, trading around the $100,000 level while gold and silver rallied aggressively. The divergence led many investors to question whether bitcoin still belonged in the debasement trade and whether its role as a hedge against fiat currency dilution had weakened.

Bitcoin has continued to fall during the broader correction. The cryptocurrency now sits below $62,000, a 50% correction from its October all-time high and is trading below its long term 200 week moving average of approximately $62,800. [...] View Full Report

More From Markets

科比西信件指出，比特币在2026年之前跌破5万美元的可能性为64%，跌破4.5万美元的可能性为46%。

# Ethereum Foundation Restructures Core Unit, Cuts Workforce [...] Writer @Victoria

Victoria Hale is a writer focused on blockchain and digital technology. She is known for her ability to simplify complex technological developments into content that is clear, easy to understand, and engaging to read.

Through her writing, Victoria covers the latest trends, innovations, and developments in the digital ecosystem, as well as their impact on the future of finance and technology. She also explores how new technologies are changing the way people interact in the digital world.

Her writing style is simple, informative, and focused on providing readers with a clear understanding of the rapidly evolving world of technology.

## Disclaimer: [...] Ethereum’s latest organizational changes indicate that it is preparing to compete more aggressively in these areas by focusing its internal resources on core protocol improvements.

The long-term impact of the restructuring will likely depend on how effectively the foundation executes its updated roadmap and how quickly new protocol enhancements are delivered to the network.

For now, the Ethereum ecosystem continues to evolve through a combination of internal development, external innovation, and rapid technological advancement across the broader blockchain industry.

items.title: On-Chain Convergence: How Regulated Rails are Redefining the Global Financial Core - The Fintech Times
items.summary: The very definition of financial inclusion is being rewritten by this technological shift. Historica
items.content:
The very definition of financial inclusion is being rewritten by this technological shift. Historically, the global unbanked population was viewed through a lens of economic underprivilege, restricted by geographic and institutional barriers. Blockchain infrastructure has fundamentally inverted this paradigm, offering immediate, borderless access to financial velocity that frequently outpaces legacy clearing networks.

##### Flipping the Script on Financial Inclusion [...] FacebookTwitterInstagramLinkedinYoutube

 About
 Editorial Calendar
 Contact Us
 Advertise
 Jobs

 Home
 World-Region-Country
 Europe
 On-Chain Convergence: How Regulated Rails are Redefining the Global Financial Core

Blockchain Europe

# On-Chain Convergence: How Regulated Rails are Redefining the Global Financial Core

by The Fintech Times [...] ##### Flipping the Script on Financial Inclusion

“The unbanked population has often been seen as underprivileged; with blockchain, the same cohort of people moved onchain and now enjoys more efficiency and speed than the traditional rails can offer,” noted Oleg Bevz, co-founder of INPUT Global. Having steered communication strategies for digital asset and fintech pioneers across the globe, Bevz emphasized that traditional finance is no longer simply watching this migration from afar; it is actively re-engineering its core stacks to participate.

### 以太坊价格面临技术阻力

ETH目前交易价格接近1,660美元。该加密货币交易在其20日、50日和100日指数移动平均线下方，分别位于1,753美元、1,901美元和2,064美元。

根据Coinglass的数据，该数字资产在过去24小时内经历了1.57亿美元的清算，其中多头头寸占到了1.4亿美元。

ETH在被下降趋势线和20日EMA拒绝后，目前正在测试1,611美元的支撑区域。如果这个水平不能维持，下一个下行目标位于1,524美元，随后的支撑区域分别在1,404美元和1,155美元。

items.title: Turbo Energy (NASDAQ: TURB) deploys 366 MWh AI-driven storage across 15 European industrial plants - Stock Titan
items.summary:
Industrial Energy Infrastructure Deployment Partnership

On June 24, 2026, Turbo Energy, S.A. (the “
items.content:
Industrial Energy Infrastructure Deployment Partnership

On June 24, 2026, Turbo Energy, S.A. (the “Company”) issued a press release announcing the deployment of a large-scale industrial energy infrastructure project in collaboration with HiTHIUM, a global provider of battery energy storage technologies.

As disclosed in the press release, the project spans 15 industrial facilities operated by a major European electro-intensive ceramic manufacturing group and includes a total planned battery energy storage capacity of 366 MWh. The project combines HiTHIUM’s battery energy storage systems with the Company’s AI-driven energy management and optimization platform, designed to optimize the interaction between renewable generation, battery storage and industrial energy consumption. [...] “Our partnership with Turbo Energy reflects HiTHIUM’s commitment to delivering intelligent, high-performance energy storage solutions tailored to the needs of Europe’s large-scale commercial and industrial enterprises,” said Kelson Li, Vice President of HiTHIUM Europe. “As industrial customers face increasing pressure from energy cost volatility, grid constraints and decarbonization targets, the combination of advanced long-duration battery storage and AI-driven energy management is becoming increasingly critical. By integrating HiTHIUM’s proven battery storage technology with Turbo Energy’s optimization capabilities, we are enabling large-scale C&I customers to deploy more resilient, efficient and economically optimized energy infrastructures. This project demonstrates how [...] Founded in 2019, HiTHIUM is a leading global company in renewable energy technology, committed to delivering energy storage solutions centered on advanced energy storage battery and system technologies. With robust research, production, sales, and service capabilities worldwide, HiTHIUM is the only energy storage-focused company to achieve GWh-scale global shipments of lithium-ion ESS batteries, reaching a milest

items.title: Turbo Energy and HiTHIUM plug AI batteries into 15 European factories - Stock Titan
items.summary: “Our partnership with Turbo Energy reflects HiTHIUM's commitment to delivering intelligent, high-per
items.content: “Our partnership with Turbo Energy reflects HiTHIUM's commitment to delivering intelligent, high-performance energy storage solutions tailored to the needs of Europe’s large-scale commercial and industrial enterprises,” said Kelson Li, Vice President of HiTHIUM Europe. “As industrial customers face increasing pressure from energy cost volatility, grid constraints and decarbonization targets, the combination of advanced long-duration battery storage and AI-driven energy management is becoming increasingly critical. By integrating HiTHIUM’s proven battery storage technology with Turbo Energy’s optimization capabilities, we are enabling large-scale C&I customers to deploy more resilient, efficient and economically optimized energy infrastructures. This project demonstrates how [...] Founded in 2019, HiTHIUM is a leading global company in renewable energy technology, committed to delivering energy storage solutions centered on advanced energy storage battery and system technologies. With robust research, production, sales, and service capabilities worldwide, HiTHIUM is the only energy storage-focused company to achieve GWh-scale global shipments of lithium-ion ESS batteries, reaching a milestone of over 100GWh in cumulative shipments in 2025. Capping off a remarkable year, HiTHIUM secured the Top 2 position globally for both total energy storage battery shipments and utility-scale battery shipments in 2025, according to authoritative institutions including InfoLink, SMM, and ICC. Through HiTHIUM Europe, the company now delivers to over 18 European countries, including [...] MUNICH, Germany, June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Turbo Energy, S.A. (Nasdaq: TURB) (“Turbo Energy” or the “Company”), a global integrator of AI-driven solar energy storage solutions and intelligent energy management systems, and HiTHIUM, a global leader in battery energy storage technology, today announced the deployment of a large-scale AI-enabled energy infrastructure project across 15 industrial

items.title: Google expands CO2 battery technology portfolio with new Ireland project - edie.net
items.summary: Google’s backing for CO2 batteries is significant, both as an example of how tech firms are playing
items.content:
Google’s backing for CO2 batteries is significant, both as an example of how tech firms are playing a more active role in the energy system and as a vote of confidence in the technology.

Google has previously stated that energy storage is vital to achieving its ambition to run on 24/7 carbon-free energy on every grid where it operates by 2030, up from 64% in 2022.

#### Topics

 Energy

#### Tags

 battery storage
 clean energy
 energy storage
 Google
 innovation
 Ireland
 long duration
 net-zero
 renewables
 technology

Save

 
  [...] The latest project in Ireland – which will be developed, owned, and operated by Energy Dome – is the parties’ first bilateral agreement. Under it, Google is effectively buying the CO2 battery’s power and capacity.

Energy Dome’s proprietary technology uses grid electricity to compress and store CO2 when energy is plentiful. This CO2 is then expanded to drive a turbine, delivering power to the grid when needed.

The system is part of a bundle of technologies known collectively as long-duration energy storage (or ‘LDES’). These grid-scale solutions store and dispatch large amounts of electricity for long periods – typically 6 to 10 hours or more – thereby tackling issues of energy oversupply and system stress that are becoming more pressing as intermittent renewables come online. # Google expands CO2 battery technology portfolio with new Ireland project

Tech giant Google has signed a commercial agreement with Italian energy storage start-up Energy Dome for a long-duration energy storage project in County Offaly, Ireland.
